contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Telegram bot reliability: empty-response + single-round tool-loop fixes
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/46
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/47
  
  Details:
  Two further fixes after the thread-id fix, making the Telegram bot actually answer multi-step questions:
  - truesight_autopilot#46: whitespace-only model output -> Telegram 400 'text must be non-empty'. Made /chat-blocking and the adapter whitespace-aware with non-empty fallbacks.
  - truesight_autopilot#47: /chat-blocking ran a single tool round (the streaming path loops). Multi-step questions truncated and an intermittent text-format tool call leaked as the reply. Replaced with a multi-round loop (up to 8) executing structured tool_calls each round, with a guard that forces a clean text-only completion on exhaustion/blank/leak. Verified end-to-end on prod: Gary's exact 'events.json layer' query now returns a full 2.6k-char answer, no leaked tool-call syntax. 21 unit tests pass.
  
  PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/46 , https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/47
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
